truth: What is the most embarrassing thing you've ever done?
What is a secret you've never told anyone?
If you could be anyone for a day, who would it be?
What is the most childish thing you still do?
Have you ever lied to get out of trouble?
What is the meanest thing you've ever said to someone?
What is your most useless talent?

dare: Sing a song loudly for 30 seconds.
Send a random emoji to the last person you DM'd.
Do your best impression of a celebrity.
Talk in an accent for the next 3 rounds.
Let another player send a message from your account (keep it safe!).
Post a silly selfie in a channel.
Eat a spoonful of a condiment you don't like.
Dance like a robot for one minute.
